title: How do I invite team members and manage roles?
content:
CloudDash uses role-based access control (RBAC) with four built-in roles:

| Role        | Description                                              |
|-------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| Owner       | Full control, billing access, can delete the account.    |
| Admin       | Manage integrations, users, and alert rules.             |
| Editor      | Create/edit dashboards and alert rules; no billing access.|
| Viewer      | Read-only access to dashboards and reports.              |

**To invite a team member:**
1. Go to Settings → Team Members → Invite Member.
2. Enter the email address and select a role.
3. Click Send Invite. The invitee receives an email with a secure link (expires in 48 hours).

**SSO:** Growth and Scale plans support SAML 2.0 SSO (Okta, Google Workspace, Azure AD). Configure under Settings → Security → Single Sign-On.

**Seat limits:** Starter: 3 seats. Growth: 15 seats. Scale: unlimited.
